title: copaifera lucens
intro: Copaifera lucens, also known as Copaiba, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Copaiba has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Copaiba include relieving anxiety and stress, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, among others. Copaiba can be prepared as an essential oil, resin, or tea, and is often used in herbal remedies for its therapeutic properties.
